title: Term of licenses
doc_html:
§3400.  Term of licenses

All licenses issued under this Chapter shall be issued for two years and shall expire on the second December thirty-first following the date on which it was issued.

Acts 1987, No. 472, §1; Acts 2003, No. 341, §1.
doc_text:
§3400.  Term of licenses
All licenses issued under this Chapter shall be issued for two years and shall expire on the second December thirty-first following the date on which it was issued.
Acts 1987, No. 472, §1; Acts 2003, No. 341, §1.
